summary: Map the whole Field Guide KB onto ALTER, anchored on david-framework (NPC→Player / 8-Layer Stack / Vibe): the spine, the Vibe assessment, the grimoire-by-layer (33 thinkers), the ordering engine (Wilber/Hawkins), the branch mechanic (Clear)

out.blueprint:
ALTER is the executable form of david-framework.md — the Human RPG made into a single-file offline PWA. The realization that ends the "what is this app" question: ALTER does not need a 17th planning doc or a new content layer, because the blueprint already exists. The 8-Layer Self-Help Stack IS the developmental spine and the toolbox taxonomy; Vibe IS the assessment ("where are you," NPC vs Player); NPC→Player IS the RPG (with two time-scales already shipped — the per-tool mastery counter and the monotonic journey floor); Investment>Force / Consistency>Intensity IS reward-never-shame. The whole Field Guide KB (33 thinkers, 262 SNs, 10 mechanisms) is the GRIMOIRE that fills the 8 shelves of the stack, and the guardian-angel is Jung's "Great Man"/Self who remembers where you are on the lifetime Trickster→Twins arc and presses the ONE right layer's tool into your hand. The one genuinely-new piece is the ORDERING ENGINE: david-framework DECLARES the laws ("a system, not a ladder"; "regulate first, then think"; "interrupt the spiral at L3"; "Investment>Force") but ships no code that decides which layer to surface when. Wilber (no-skip sequence + states-vs-stages), Hawkins (the 200-line = the NPC→Player crossing + the entry-point rule), and Jung (strong-affect = the bottleneck) are IMPORTED to OPERATIONALIZE those declared laws — they are not in david-framework itself, and the re-anchor must say so honestly. This makes reward-never-shame a MEASURED law, not a vibe: Hawkins proves Force (shame/willpower/self-attack) is a below-200 strategy that structurally cannot lift you, so the app banning it is physics, not kindness.

The move is RE-ANCHOR, NOT REBUILD. SOUL-OF-ALTER's 5 legs stay verbatim as the SURFACES the user touches; the 8-Layer Stack is named as the invisible SPINE underneath that routes them. This is buildable and largely already shipped — partXTriage() is the body-first Body→Observer→Label→Tool router with the grievance→Active-Love-before-Grateful-Flow guard hard-coded; toolRung() already counts Willingness→Habit→Grace; journeyNode() is the monotonic never-demoting floor; the grimoire is already layer-grouped; avoidedBlock()→reversalOfDesire() is the first proactive() hand-off. The actual NET-NEW surface is narrow and that is the point (avoid re-speccing shipped code): a vibeProfile() that replaces the single readiness() scalar with a 3-axis read, the Hawkins band rendered as the app's core "where are you" dial with one lit 200-line, and Vibe-GATED routing in proactive() (today it routes by clock-phase + avoidedBlock, not by an inferred band). Critically, the band's INPUT blend is a DAVID-PENDING decision and a DESIGN HEURISTIC, never KB-measured science (the LOC scale is kinesiology-derived) — the 200-line is internal ordering vocabulary, never a number shown to David. Everything is additive (no SCHEMA bump, matching the S.tools/S.guide/S.mood precedent), offline-clever-first (the AI brain personalizes one line and degrades silently), ships behind the Guided/Light/Off dial defaulting off, and NEVER touches the 3x-rebuilt timeline render. The deepest cut past Johnson, which david-framework already makes: Frankl's noo-dynamic tension reframes the areté-gap ITSELF as the engine, not the wound — so the gap-to-best-self renders as health, the deepest reward-never-shame mechanism in the KB.
spine: THE SPINE = david-framework's 8-Layer Self-Help Stack, named once at the top of SOUL-OF-ALTER as the invisible developmental spine under the 5 legs. It RE-ANCHORS the legs, never replaces them: the legs are the surfaces the user touches; the stack decides what each leg surfaces, in what order, and when a branch unlocks. Layer numbers are routing/taxonomy internals — they NEVER appear as 8 menu tiles (that would be the menu-of-options anti-pattern, P1).

Leg→Layer mapping (the legs ARE the stack's organs): Leg 1 burning timeline = L1-L2 body-state surface (now-line breathing at 6/min) that every layer writes into via the safe path. Leg 2 AM/PM bookends = the L5 identity install (AM) + L3 awareness + L6 perception (PM revision) closed into one organ. Leg 3 grimoire = the 8 layers ARE the toolbox's shelves. Leg 4 journey/life-tree = the NPC→Player RPG (8 virtue branches map to the stack, Clear's ladder deepens each). Leg 5 world/angel = L8 meta-support embodied (the guardian who remembers = Jung's Self).

THE ORDERING LAW, encoded once and obeyed everywhere (the executable form of P7 body-first): (1) READ Vibe against a simplified Hawkins band, the 200 line = the one visible NPC→Player threshold; (2) if below the line / dysregulated, route DOWN to an L1-L2 body reset FIRST (Dispenza: Survival Mode can't install; Hawkins: Force can't exit Force) — never hand an L5/L6 identity/perception/cognitive-reframe tool to a dysregulated body; (3) then L3 awareness (the downward-spiral interrupt point, the 'name the field' gap); (4) then upward, but Wilber's no-skip locks hold; (5) Jung's strong-affect signal picks the day's ONE focus.

FIDELITY FIX (high-severity, verified against david-hawkins-master-guide.md lines 78-114): the three 200-CROSSING MOVES (L1 physiology / L3 awareness / L7 environment) are what LIFT you across 200 — they are NOT the only layers reachable below 200. The same guide prescribes L4 emotional clearing below 200 (Guilt 30 → 'L4 must precede L5'; Grief 75 → 'L4 processing'; Anger 150 → 'L4 the underlying fear'). So below-200 routing MUST still allow L4 emotional-clearing tools (Stutz Active Love, Clean-to-Zero) — these are KB-sanctioned below-200 entries. The strict WITHHOLD rule applies ONLY to L5/L6 identity/perception/cognitive-reframe tools (verified line 289: 'affirmations delivered from below 200 do not reach the mechanism'). Without this fix the body-first router would suppress the very Stutz L4 tools it is built on.

PROGRESS IS STATE→STAGE (Wilber SN-126), already shipped as the substrate: a good day = a SPARK (temporary state, reuses S.game.spark); permanence only crystallizes after N integrated reps over time = a STAGE (the existing toolRung Willingness→Habit→Grace counter at app.js:4132 IS the state→stage converter). Never a breakable streak; journeyNode()'s monotonic floor (app.js:327, 'reward-never-shame as math') never demotes.

'A system, not a ladder; all layers interact' stays TRUE for calm browsing (the grimoire is a web the guardian routes through); body-first is the routing rule ONLY under load. The stack is a web, not a staircase — the ordering law is the under-load arbiter, not a forced linear curriculum.
vibeAssessment: VIBE = THE ASSESSMENT ('where are you'), made the app's core signal. Deepen readiness() (the existing 0..1 follow-through scalar at app.js:316) into a NEW pure vibeProfile() beside it — same cache-per-logical-day contract (S.guide.cache, no save, no SCHEMA bump). readiness() stays the public scalar so journeyNode()/journeyTick() keep working unchanged (additive, zero regression).

vibeProfile() returns a 3-axis VECTOR, never one grade, from data ALREADY in S: (1) REGULATION (L1-L2 floor) = sleep from S.profile.sleep/bedHour() + restore-domain activity + drift-domain density over lastDays(3) + currentMood(); (2) ALIGNMENT (L5-L7) = the existing follow-through math + whether kept blocks hit the user's own goal/virtue domains; (3) AWARENESS (L3, Conway-Smith) = bookend-engagement rate + mood-logging frequency + tool-use reps (a behavioral proxy for 'is the metacognitive observer online').

The headline axis maps onto a simplified 8-rung Hawkins band: Shutdown/Shame · Fear/Anger · Pride · COURAGE (=the 200 line) · Neutrality · Willingness · Acceptance · Love. Rendered with the LOCKED berry palette + scarcity-of-brightness (P10): matte-cool below 200, warm above, the 200 line the SINGLE bright reward-tier crossing (honors 'now-line is the brightest thing'). It is FEEDBACK, never a grade (Vibe = signal not identity, david-framework Principle 2); PM copy reads 'thank you for showing me the evidence of my vibration' (Withers), never 'you were low.'

HONEST LIMITS (resolving the depth critique): the band is inferred from THIN offline proxies (sleep is one coarse onboarding self-report via bedHour(); drift is a fixed keyword substring list; follow-through ratio; mood) — mapping that noisy blend onto a 17-level scale adds VOCABULARY, not resolution, and cannot reliably separate Fear from Pride. Mitigations are mandatory: bias WARM/neutral when signals are sparse (a quiet day reads warm, P9); require MULTI-DAY persistence before any band DOWNGRADE; keep the band a PRIVATE routing input first, surfaced to David only after it feels right on device; label DEVICE-UNTESTED until he confirms it matches his felt state.

The Hawkins LOC scale is kinesiology-derived (low evidence quality, verified line 49). Therefore: the offline-signal→band mapping is explicitly an ALTER DESIGN HEURISTIC, not a KB-grounded calibration; the 200-line is internal ordering vocabulary and felt-signal language, NEVER a numeric LOC readout shown to the user; and the exact INPUT blend (how state is sensed without sensors) is DAVID-PENDING — flag it in the DAVID-DECIDES block, do not ship a guessed inference. Real sleep/HRV is the far-future BYO-device ceiling, not core.

AWARENESS is a TRAINABLE skill, not a score: the awareness floor renders as the existing per-tool mastery counter (toolRung, counting UP through Willingness→Habit→Grace), surfaced as an INVITATION ('awareness is your growth edge — a few more bookend/mood reps'), never a deficit bar. Conway-Smith's law that the metacognitive threshold is RAISED by poor sleep/load is WHY awareness is inferred from the regulation axis, not asked cold — on a red-sleep day the app expects low awareness and routes to L1 first (don't ask a depleted mind to self-observe).
grimoireByLayer: L1-L2 BODY FLOOR — regulate-first-then-think, the mandatory bounce under load. ONE fused 6-breath/min (0.1 Hz, verified in hrv-heart-coherence.md) super-tool unifying McKeown (nasal/long-exhale/BOLT), Childre/HeartMath (coherence), Porges (vagal) into a single animated cue (extends the shipped breathwork runner; the now-line breathes at 6/min). Sleep (Walker) = silent AM Vibe-input; short sleep dims-warm, NEVER red. UNUSED GEM to wire here: movement as a first-class L1 branch — SN-237 Hope Molecules (exercise = antidepressant, 'a walk counts' keeps it reward-never-shame) + morning-light (SN-241) + ultradian 90-min cadence (SN-218) shaping the Plan leg. Thinkers: Walker, McKeown, Childre, Sapolsky (cortisol bans shame), Dispenza (Survival/Creation = the biological install gate).

L3 AWARENESS — the spiral-breaker and the Vibe read's home (david-framework: 'interruption point: early awareness, Layer 3'; 'awareness = the meta-skill'). Tools are GAP-openers: Tolle's watch-the-thinker that opens IN the body (inner-body portal = ventral-vagal, doubles as L2), Kurpatov's observer-position, the Stoic Pause/epoche. Conway-Smith's variable threshold is the gate (cortisol/short-sleep raise it → don't offer an awareness prompt on a red L1). WIRE SN-236 'Name It to Tame It' (Siegel: affect-labeling → PFC up, amygdala down) as the verbatim label-step — it IS Hawkins's L3 'name the field' crossing-move with neuroscience. Thinkers: Conway-Smith, Tolle, Kurpatov, Stoics.

L4 EMOTIONAL REGULATION — Stutz's trigger→tool routing engine, ALREADY SHIPPED as partXTriage() (Body→Observer→Label→Tool, grievance guard hard-coded). VERIFIED PAIRINGS (fixing the mined-material slip against phil-stutz-master-guide.md lines 33-36): Self-gratification→Black Sun · Lethargy→Vortex · False-Hope/Demoralization→Mother · Hurt-Feelings/Victim→Tower (Tower = grievance/victim, NOT 'deep wound'; Mother = crushed hope/demoralization). Plus Reversal of Desire (avoidance, shipped), Active Love (grievance), Vitale Clean-to-Zero (Ho'oponopono — the no-diagnosis universal when Vibe is low-but-unlabelled, the case Stutz's routing can't resolve), Pressfield 'show up 5 min' (Resistance). Two hard guards: Grateful Flow suppressed while grievance live (Active Love first); Jeopardy only post-win. L4 IS a sanctioned below-200 entry (the fidelity fix) — it is NOT withheld below the line. Re-verify Ruiz/Vitale runner copy verbatim before shipping (KB flags them as secondary-analysis builds).

L5 IDENTITY REPROGRAMMING — the AM bookend as a Theatre-of-the-Mind master-program update, NOT journaling (the nervous system can't tell vivid rehearsal from real, SN-105). Gated body-first (no install into a dysregulated system — Dispenza's Survival Mode). The ONE protocol all converge on (SN-106): relax → vivid present-tense felt self-image → repetition. Copy-lints: Goddard's FROM-not-OF ('I am the person who…' / 'it is done', never 'I want to…'); Maltz's verb/noun ('today drifted' NEVER 'you're someone who drifts'); Dweck's process-not-trait praise everywhere. Clear's identity-VOTES are the install mechanism (already in JOURNEY node). Seed = mantraPlayer (David's 24-line affirmation, shipped). HARD GATE: Blair induction scripts + Robbins RELEASE→GRATITUDE→FUTURE-ENERGY transcript are DAVID-PENDING — build the runner shell + 5-section template ONLY, never auto-write. Thinkers: Maltz, Goddard, Murphy, Blair, Dispenza (felt-state target). NOTE: Dweck/Sapolsky/Ruiz-Agreement-4 are META/lint constraints that SPAN layers (the 4th soul-seam), NOT L5 residents — david-framework's L5 row is narrowly install-tools.

L6 PERCEPTION TRAINING — david-framework names 'Gratitude (Grateful Flow / Phil Stutz)' as THE L6 tool; the shipped gratefulFlow runner becomes the daily baseline-raiser. Science AS design: prompt 3 SPECIFIC items, then a forced 20-30s chest-dwell timer (Hanson Velcro/Teflon install window SN-242 — a checkbox list fails) so it's a STATE-CHANGE. Earns a RARE warm shine, never a streak. The REFRAMES — Ruiz's 'Their Dream' (Agreement 2), Stoic Sorting/Two-Handles, Withers's one-rung-up — route ONLY after the body is regulated AND any grievance discharged (the hard guard). Accumulated dwell visibly raises the Vibe band's FLOOR (the upward loop made visible). Thinkers: Stutz (Grateful Flow), Ruiz, Withers, Hanson.

L7 ENVIRONMENT & INPUTS — Newport's architecture-over-discipline ('you are outgunned, not weak'). The Inputs Guardian extends the life-state twin from room to attention: a trackable 'Solitude block' on the timeline (earns shine — solitude becomes tracked, not deprivation); a 3-question reintroduction flow on scroll-drift (framed 'outgunned', ban 'wasted'). Clear's Four Laws = environment design. Carr's Liberation tool generalizes quitting (Two Monsters; relapse is data, not reset-to-zero). Grenny's Crucial-Conversation prep is a body-first runner (refuses to run dysregulated, bounces to Active Love/breath first). SN-230 Odysseus Contracts grounds the Plan-leg non-negotiables. Use SN-234 (lion-vs-jungle) + SN-152 (outgunned) as the copy-soul AND a self-check: ALTER itself must be liking-shaped (install), not wanting-shaped (extraction).

L8 META-SUPPORT — the guardian itself (david-framework: 'AI as assistant, planning when tired, reflection when emotional — reduce cognitive load'). Kahneman: System-2 is depletable → the DEPLETION GUARD shrinks choice when low (fewer chips, app carries more load, P4) + engineers the PM ending via peak-end. Frankl supplies the TELOS the upward loop climbs toward: the noo-dynamic tension ('the gap is the ENGINE, not the wound') reframes the whole areté-gap as HEALTH (the deepest anti-shame mechanism in the KB); the AM why-chips source to his three meaning-paths (Creative/Experiential/Attitudinal) so a hard day ALWAYS has the Attitudinal path open. HARD FLOOR (P5): works WITHOUT an AI brain — verbatim KB scripts ARE the product; the BYO-key brain personalizes ONE line and degrades silently. KB-PENDING: do NOT build GABA/serotonin-grounded claims — no mechanism file exists yet (KB-INDEX names them as gaps).
orderingEngine: THE ORDERING ENGINE is the one genuinely-new piece and the part david-framework most demands ('a system, not a ladder') yet under-specifies. It answers three questions every session in fixed precedence — READ → GATE → PICK — as ~5 PURE functions over S, feeding the ONE existing proactive() seam (NEVER a parallel router — that is the v488-vs-pager bounce the regression contract warns of). Provenance, stated honestly: Wilber/Hawkins/Jung are IMPORTED to operationalize david-framework's declared laws (body-first, interrupt-at-L3, Investment>Force); the framework declares the LAWS, these three supply the sequencing MECHANICS.

readVibe(S) → the single band (READ). Collapses live signals into one Hawkins band (the assessment scalar). Inputs already in S: morning sleep, drift count, live-grievance flag, recovery-speed since last drift (the Stoic equanimity metric), vState.level. Below 200 = Force/NPC/matte-cool; above = Power/Player/warm; the 200 line is the single drawn threshold. Data, never a grade.

gateLayers(S) → {unlocked, locked, bottleneck} (GATE — Wilber no-skip + spiritual-bypass guard). A layer unlocks only when its prerequisite layer holds a rolling stability floor (L5 identity-reprogramming LOCKED if L1 sleep/movement has been red for N days). The lock points DOWN to the bottleneck warmly ('your body is asking first'), NEVER shames, NEVER blocks browsing, renders dim-calm not red, and NEVER removes from S.guide.unlocked (preserves journeyNode's monotonic floor — the lock is a soft redirect of the OFFER, not a UI gate; if it can demote, cut it). The BOTTLENECK = the single weakest stable layer, sharpened by Jung's strong-affect signal (a rage-skipped block / recurring abandoned intention flags ITS layer). This surfaces ONE layer, the cure for #11 overwhelming.

pickMove(band, bottleneck, S) → one toolId (PICK — Hawkins entry-point rule, never a menu). BELOW 200: offer the three crossing-MOVES (L1 body / L3 name-the-field / L7 environment) AND L4 emotional-clearing tools (the fidelity fix — Active Love, Clean-to-Zero are KB-sanctioned below-200 entries); WITHHOLD only L5/L6 identity/perception/cognitive-reframe tools (they bounce). ABOVE 200: unlock the upper layers (L6 Grateful Flow, L5 identity). Within the chosen layer, a new branch starts at Clear's Two-Minute first rung; Goldilocks raises difficulty on boredom within the SAME branch. Wire as ONE new branch at the TOP of proactive(), extending the existing avoidedBlock→reversal pattern (app.js:2360), same once/day gate via S.tools.last.

bodyFirstInterrupt(S) → overrides pickMove when dysregulated (the hard ordering law as code precedence). If state reads Survival (acute drift spike + Fear/Anger band + grievance flag), bounce to the fused 6-br/min reset FIRST, THEN label 'That's Part X — not you,' THEN re-enter pickMove. This is ALREADY HALF-SHIPPED as partXTriage() — the engine extends it, does not re-spec it. Hard guards encoded: Grateful Flow suppressed while grievance live; Jeopardy only post-win.

Force-detector + verb/noun lint (reward-never-shame as MATH, the engine's OUTPUT filter). Any move framed as self-attack / 'I should or I'm worthless' / willpower-grind is reframed toward Investment — because Hawkins proves Force generates counter-force and structurally cannot lift you above 200. Bans should/must/wasted/failed/missed (Sapolsky: self-judgment = social-evaluative threat → cortisol → PFC offline; Murphy: 'never finish a negative statement'; Maltz verb/noun; Ruiz Agreement-1 'would I say this to someone I love?'). Best is VARIABLE by today's seeded capacity (Ruiz Agreement 4 ↔ areté) — a low-energy day that got its variable-best reads WARM, never deficit. The engine is forbidden BY CONSTRUCTION from returning a Force move as the path up.

BUILD DISCIPLINE: ships behind S.guide.mode (defaults 'off' = inert), additive (NO SCHEMA bump), proven on ONE route first (the starred-block-crosses-now-line hand-off) before generalizing. Synthetic tests prove the pure logic boots clean; whether the hand-off FEELS right is DEVICE-UNTESTED — label it, never write 'verified' for felt routing. Recovery-speed and Jung's strong-affect history must read from existing logged data (S.log/S.game.ups) without a new history structure or a schema bump.
branchMechanic: THE BRANCH / SKILL-LADDER MECHANIC = Clear's Atomic Habits + Duolingo as the Journey leg's growth engine, on Conway-Smith's 8 virtue branches (SN-232), framed by Jung's lifetime arc. The tree has THREE tiers: a TRUNK (the 8-layer stack, the developmental spine), 8 SHARED BOUGHS (the 8 Virtue Declarations, already DOM domains), and BRANCHES (any user-named pursuit grafted onto exactly one bough).

THE GRAFT — every branch is born identity-first (Clear Step 1: identity, never goal). When the user names a pursuit ('learn piano' / 'floss' / 'call mom'), the app runs Clear's translation ('what type of person does this?' → 'I am someone who makes music') and auto-routes it under one of the 8 virtue boughs. Offline-clever: a verbatim Clear-template prompt computes the identity line (one chip + free-type, honoring find-your-way #11).

ONE OBJECT, TWO RENDERS — a habit and a skill are the SAME object at different ladder-depths (Goldilocks SN-094 says depth is demand-driven). A branch = {identity, boughId, rungs[], votes, lastVote, lastMiss}. Rung 1 is ALWAYS Clear's Two-Minute Rule ('master showing up'). If no rungs are added, it renders as a STREAK-with-forgiveness = a habit. If rungs are added (offline: manual milestone list; AI-ceiling: askBrain drafts the ladder, app.js:449), it renders as a DUOLINGO PATH = a skill. No mode-switch fork; Goldilocks auto-suggests the next rung WITHIN the same branch on boredom, never 'switch domains.'

VOTES AS WARMTH, NEVER-MISS-TWICE AS THE ONLY INTERVENTION. Each completed rung casts an identity vote, surfaced as the branch WARMING on the tree (P8: warmth, never a depletion bar, never hearts). The breakable streak is replaced by Clear's NEVER-MISS-TWICE: missing once is invisible (drift is data); the guardian intervenes (one gentle nudge) only on the SECOND consecutive miss. Plateau-of-Latent-Potential is the anti-quit copy ('the work is stored; the ice melts at 32°'). Per-branch mastery counts UP through Willingness→Habit→Grace — a relapse restarts the CHAIN, never resets the COUNTER (journeyNode's sticky-floor math applied per-branch).

COEXISTENCE LAW — branches share the spine's gating and the soul-seams so 8 branches stay ONE tree, not 8 apps: (1) Wilber no-skip gating on the SPINE not the branches (a branch's higher rungs lock only if the underlying stack-layer is red); (2) the CONTINUITY seam — each branch's next-undone-rung flows into the ONE timeline via the existing activeGoals()→scheduleSubtask() safe path, never its own screen; (3) the ROUTING seam — the guardian surfaces ONE branch's next rung at a time (Newport's active-goal cap), picked by Jung's strong-affect bottleneck-detector. Progressive disclosure: a new user sees the trunk + one starter branch.

SCHEMA RESOLUTION (resolving the high-severity self-contradiction): do NOT bump SCHEMA. The verified app discipline is SCHEMA=1, never bumped, additive defensive defaults in load() (S.tools/S.mood/S.acts/S.bk/S.guide all rode in with no bump, no migrate() exists). Extend S.goals ADDITIVELY with guarded defaults (g.identity = g.identity||'', g.boughId = g.boughId || domainOf(g)), inferring on read — exactly the precedent. A bump+migration would be the codebase's first-ever and is the one thing that can wipe David's real data.

RELATIONSHIPS AS BRANCHES proves the mechanic generalizes: 'be present with my partner' grafts onto the LOVE bough, rungs are Grenny-shaped relational reps (Two-Minute: 'one undistracted question at dinner'; deeper: a Crucial-Conversation prep). Habit / skill / relationship are the same {identity, boughId, rungs, votes} shape — only rung CONTENT differs, sourced offline-clever from the matching KB tool. AI-ladder is lubricant, never the spine: the offline manual milestone list must stand alone (P5).
npcPlayer: NPC→Player IS the game; david-framework is the OS, the KB is the content library, ALTER is the OS made executable. The world/guardian/timeline reflect your MODE: NPC = dim, dysregulated, future-faint; Player = alive, regulated, the past printing metallic-bright. This re-anchors the existing loadWorld/loadFairy bloom — NPC-band = the moody navy night stays dim, Player-band = the world blooms.

Vibe is the single dial that reads your mode against Hawkins's 200-line (Pride 175 → Courage 200 = the verified phase transition, NOT a continuum). Crossing 200 SUSTAINED across days (Force-band days → Power-band days) is a real, earned RPG level-up event in the journey tree — the in-app form of NPC→Player. Verified in the guide: 'the 200 crossing is rarely dramatic... the moment the person stops defending the lower attractor and begins to observe it.'

Two time-scales of the RPG, both ALREADY in app.js: (1) the per-tool mastery counter (toolRung Willingness→Habit→Grace in S.tools = Wilber's state→stage converter, the cure for streaks); (2) the journey floor (readiness()→journeyNode()→S.guide.unlocked = the monotonic never-demoting skill-ladder = Jung's Trickster→Hare→Red Horn→Twins arc). The engine fills these in, it does not invent them.

SPARK vs STAGE enforces Wilber's anti-cheat so the RPG never awards hollow points: a SPARK (single bright pulse, reuses S.game.spark) fires for any good day = a temporary STATE; a STAGE crystallizes into a permanently-lit branch only after N integrated reps over time. The player FEELS the difference between 'I had a good day' and 'this is now who I am.' A SPIRITUAL-BYPASS GUARD redirects grinding-a-high-layer-while-a-foundation-is-red ('your body is asking first').

THE GUARDIAN-AS-WISE-COMPANION = Jung's 'Great Man'/Self who remembers (the soul-layer's continuity seam, offline, local). It tracks where you sit on the 4-stage hero arc and runs the BOTTLENECK PICKER — watching for strong-affect signals (a rage-skipped block, an avoided category, a recurring abandoned intention) and surfacing THAT as the day's ONE focus ('the thing you keep flinching from is the door'). GROUND THE GUARDIAN'S CALM IN SCIENCE (unused gem): co-regulation (SN-138 heart's EM field, SN-247 polyvagal) makes the steady warm presence a REGULATORY mechanism, not just UX — this is WHY witness-not-coach and warm-never-red matter biologically. Cap surfacing, rotate, never re-offer the same flinched-from block twice (P12 witness-not-coach).

THE ENDGAME is contribution-flavored (Jung's Twins/Stage-4 + Frankl + david-framework's 'you owe the world your clarity'): your mastered routine becomes something you GIVE. Make CONTRIBUTION a small RECURRING mechanic, not just a finale (SN-240 hero-becomes-guide) — a 'give' beat at high-Vibe/post-mastery (teach-back, a kindness block) that earns the rarest shine, closing the upward loop the framework draws (Contribution → higher baseline vibe).

THE REWARD ENGINE on the wanting/liking split (the single most-underused KB gem, SN-156/157 + dopamine.md): the now-line CROSSING = the anticipation/wanting beat (dopamine, drives toward the block); the kept-block shine + the 20-30s gratitude chest-dwell = the liking/install beat (opioid, must dwell to install per Hanson SN-242). LINT: any reward that spikes-and-vanishes (a points pop, a streak number) is a wanting-trap and is banned exactly as gold-for-done is banned — rewards must be liking-shaped (warmth that persists, a branch that stays lit). This is why 'doing what you planned feels magical' and why the app must not become another extraction surface.

COMPOUNDING-MADE-VISIBLE (the framework's central thesis, currently only copy): build the Plateau/Valley-of-Disappointment as a VISUAL on the journey tree (SN-243 Domino/Magic-Pennies, SN-238 Leonard's mastery) — stored-but-not-yet-visible work renders as latent potential so the Valley is shown as ACCUMULATION, not absence. Without it, 'Investment>Force / Consistency>Intensity' is unproven to the user.
constitutionUpdates: EDIT IN PLACE — never a 17th doc (CLAUDE.md / P14). Add a new section 'THE FRAMEWORK ALTER EXECUTES' immediately ABOVE 'THE CANON' (line 62): one paragraph declaring the four-part identity — ALTER is the executable form of david-framework.md (the Human RPG). SPINE = the 8-Layer Self-Help Stack (every block/tool/goal hangs off one layer). ASSESSMENT = Vibe, read as a calibrated band not a mood. RPG = NPC→Player (the level-up is real, earned, rendered). GRIMOIRE = the 33 thinkers sorted INTO the 8 layers. ORDERING = the engine that decides which layer to surface when. State plainly that Wilber/Hawkins/Jung are IMPORTED to operationalize david-framework's declared laws, not that the framework already ships the ordering engine.

Add a 3-column mapping table under that section: Stack Layer | Constitution organ already serving it | Thinkers housed there. openQuestions: VIBE INPUT BLEND (DAVID-DECIDES, the load-bearing unknown): with no biometric sensor in v1, what exact offline signals seed the band, and at what weights? Sleep is one coarse onboarding self-report; drift is a keyword-substring proxy; follow-through + mood round it out. The blend determines whether the whole route is right — and a wrong below-200 read that locks a branch or bounces a fine user reads as the app condescending (the opposite of the soul). Ship the gentlest move on ambiguous signal; David must bless the blend.

How VISIBLE is the band to David vs kept a private routing input? Naming it ('you're in Fear/Pride') risks a verdict (the opposite of Vibe-as-signal). Candidate: surface only the warm/cool palette shift + the 200-crossing celebration, never the rung label — but this is his call once he feels the read on device.

Does the Wilber LADDER-WITH-LOCKS earn its keep, or is it one keystroke from a shame mechanic on an explicitly non-demoting engine? journeyNode() is deliberately monotonic. If a lock can ever read as 'you haven't earned this' or demote, it should be cut to a pure soft-redirect-of-the-OFFER. Test on device: does a locked branch feel like care ('your body is asking first') or like withholding?

Is the chores/room LIFE-STATE TWIN (#8) in v1 (the cheapest 'knows-you' lever and the natural home for the L7 Inputs Guardian), or deferred? It forces the bigger scope question — self-help-stack app vs full life-OS — that David must narrow, not have decided for him.

When does the guardian's living BODY/animation/voice get real investment (the aliveness the swarm most missed) vs stay a stub while the seams are built? The co-regulation grounding (SN-138/247) argues the warm presence IS a mechanism worth investing in sooner — but the world is correctly built last (game-plan Step 8).

The KINESIOLOGY problem in practice: even as internal vocabulary, does a Hawkins-banded read mislabel often enough to erode trust? Requires multi-day persistence before downgrade + warm-bias on sparse signal — but only David's lived use can confirm the read tracks his felt state.

How hard does the BOTTLENECK PICKER push? Jung's strong-affect signal can over-fixate on a sore spot and feel like nagging (violating witness-not-coach, P12). Needs a hard cap (the one-nudge/day budget), rotation, and a never-re-offer-the-same-flinched-block rule — confirm the register on device.

CONTENT GATES that must stay blocked until David fills them: Blair induction scripts, the Robbins RELEASE→GRATITUDE→FUTURE-ENERGY transcript, and the GABA/serotonin/opioid-endocannabinoid mechanism files (the last grounds the liking-half of the reward engine — its absence leaves the wanting/liking spec resting on SN-156/157 alone).
